items.name_en: ❤️2025 Spring/Summer Collection Gucci 73 Series draws inspiration from a vintage bucket bag released in the same year as the collection name. This bag interprets the horsebit motif with modern aesthetics. It can be worn crossbody, on the shoulder, or carried as a handbag. Model 833665, Calfskin, Mini size: 18.5x20x8.5

items.name_en: ❤️Dionysus Series GG Chain Wallet!!️《Gucci Guilty Forever》New Fashion Collection, GG Supreme canvas presents classic and timeless blue and beige combination, inheriting the historical origin of the material. The canvas material, which has a lower impact on the environment, has been used for a long time in multiple series and has become the brand's iconic material. This Dionysus chain wallet features classic colorways. Model: 476432. Size: 16.5*10*4.5cm. Color: Brown leather with canvas.

items.name_en: 🌷 Style No. 735145. The new GG brand collections continue the design philosophy that items should not only be trendy for one season but remain timeless as time passes. The classic interlaced letter element derived from the initials of Guccio Gucci continues to infuse the brand's iconic charm into new designs. This Ophidia small handbag features historic GG Supreme canvas material and is equipped with double G accessories.
items.name_cn:
🌷 Style No. 735145. The new GG brand collections continue the design philosophy that items should not only be trendy for one season but remain timeless as time passes. The classic interlaced letter element derived from the initials of Guccio Gucci continues to infuse the brand's iconic charm into new designs. This Ophidia small handbag features historic GG Supreme canvas material and is equipped with double G accessories.
Hidden Details
Beige and Ebony GG Supreme canvas
Brown leather trim
Double G
Adjustable top handle
Top zip closure
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 🌷《With Full Original Green Box Packaging》🌷
items.name_cn:
🌷《With Full Original Green Box Packaging》🌷
[New] GG Marmont Series Mini Handbag. The GG Marmont series interprets classic colors with a new silhouette, showcasing early autumn charm. This handbag is crafted from Gucci Beige (Rosso Ancora) quilted V-shaped leather, featuring a detachable light gold-tone chain strap with a removable buckle. Magnetic flap closure with double G accents. Gucci Beige (Rosso Ancora) quilted V-shaped leather, Gucci Beige (Rosso Ancora) leather trim, light gold-tone accessories.
Model: 811238.
Size: 17✖️13✖️6cm.
Color: Beige/Original Leather.

items.name_en: 🌷《With Full Original Green Box Packaging》🌷
items.name_cn:
🌷《With Full Original Green Box Packaging》🌷
[New] 👉 GG Marmont Ultra Mini Bag
This GG Marmont ultra mini bag is crafted from quilted V-shaped leather in a refined beige tone, adding a bright new piece to the 2025 Early Spring collection. The item features the series' iconic double G motif, a vintage 1970s symbol that has become a classic element of the brand. Beige quilted V-shaped leather, light gold-tone accessories, cotton-linen blend lining, comes with a keychain that can be connected separately, double G, chain shoulder strap (60cm high), Weight: approx. 0.35kg
Model: 476433.
Size: 16.5(L)x 10(W)x 4.5cm(T)
Color: Beige Full Leather/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
Model Height: 176cm
Fits: iPhone Pro, card holder, and lipstick

items.name_en: 🌷《With Full Original Green Box Packaging》🌷
items.name_cn:
🌷《With Full Original Green Box Packaging》🌷
Original Leather [New] GG Marmont Quilted Mini Bag. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability silhouette and neutral beige quilted V-shaped leather. The bag is slightly structured with a flap closure and double G accessories. It offers versatile carrying styles, easily switching between shoulder and handbag by sliding the metal chain. Beige quilted V-shaped leather, gold-tone accessories, cotton-linen blend lining, double G, chain strap (55cm high) or top handle (30cm high). Also works as a crossbody. Spring buckle flap, Weight: approx. 0.6kg.
Model: 446744.
Size: 22(W)x 13(H)x 6cm(D)
Color: Beige Full Leather/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
Fits: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, small wallet, and lipstick
